vkSj lans; gksxk% Vksy Iyktk dk voLFkku ¼pSust½ lM+d dh led{k yEckbZ esa ifjofrZr fd, tkus gsrq lajpukvksa dh yEckbZ ¼fd-eh- esa½ lM+d dh led{k yEckbZ ¼fd-eh- esa½ nj ftlij 'kqYd lans; gS 187-50 fd-eh- ¼tkykSu ftys esa ,sr xkao ds ikl½ 0-093* 0-930 Åij lkj.kh 1 esa mfYyf[kr vk/kkj njksa dk 100% * lajpukvksa ¼60 ehVj ls vf/kd dh yEckbZ okyh½ dk C;kSjk fuEukuqlkj gS% Øe la[;k pSust ¼fd-eh-½ lajpuk dk vk/kkj dqy yEckbZ ¼ehVj½ ¼i½ 223$585 jsyos vksoj fczt 93-000 ehVj lajpuk dh dqy yEckbZ 93-000 ehVj [Qk- la- Hkkjkjkizk@13013@601@10&11@lhvks@thlh&>kalh ¼155&220½] nf{krk nkl] la;qDr lfpo MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 25th July, 2016 S.O. 2524(E).— Whereas, in exercise of the powers conferred by section 7 of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), read with Rule 3 of the National Highways Fee (Determination of Rates and Collection) Rules, 2008 published vide G.S.R 838(E) dated 5th December, 2008 and amended from time to time, the Central Government, vide notification S.O. 422(E) dated 21.02.2013 authorized National Highways Authority of India to collect, either through its officials or through a contractor, fee for use of the four and more lanes section from kilometer 155.000 to kilometer 220.000 (on the National Highway No. 25 in the State of Uttar Pradesh. Now, in exercise of the powers conferred by section 7 of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), read with Rule 3 of the National Highways Fee (Determination of Rates and Collection) Rules 2008 and amended from time to time, the Central Government hereby makes the following amendments in the notification published vide S.O. 422(E) dated 21.02.2013. -- 2 of 4 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(ii)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 3 (a) For the words and figures in Para 3 of the notification: In place of existing Shall be substituted as kilometre 155.000 to kilometre 220.000 of NH-25 kilometre 157.850 to kilometre 225.713 of NH-25 Net road section length 39.215 kilometre Net road section length 37.879 kilometre (b) For the table in Para-1 of Notes, the following table shall be substituted: Location of Toll Plaza (Chainage) Length (in km) for which fee is payable Km 187.50 (near Ait village in Jalaun district) 37.879 (c) For the table in Para-2 of Notes, the following table shall be substituted: Location of Toll Plaza (Chainage) Length of Bypass (in km) for which fee is payable Name of bypass Km 187.50 (near Ait village in Jalaun district) 4.810 Punchh 4.224 Ait 2.100 Girthan 16.457 (excluding length of structure >60m) Orai 2.300 Somai Total 29.891 (d) After Para-2 of Notes, the following Para shall be inserted, namely:- “ 2(A) In addition to above, the following fee shall also be due and payable for the use of the following structures having length more than 60 m at the following toll plaza(s), by converting the length of structures into an equivalent length of highway by multiplying the length of such structures by an equalization factor of 10: Location of Toll Plaza (chainage) Length of structures (in km) to be converted into equivalent road length Equivalent road length (in km) Rate at which fee is payable Km 187.50 (near Ait village in Jalaun district) 0.093* 0.930 100% of the base rates mentioned in Table-1 above -- 3 of 4 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] * The details of structures (> 60 m length) are as under: S. No. Chainage (km) Type of structure Total length (meter) (i) 223+585 Railway Over Bridge 93.000 m Total length of structure 93.000 m ” [F. No. NHAI/ 13013/601/10-11/ CO/GC- Jhansi (155-220)] DAKSHITA DAS, Jt. Secy.
